title: Chaptalia nutans

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, including its flower structure and growth habit. Chaptalia nutans is further classified as a member of the subfamily Asteroideae, which includes many species of daisies and sunflowers. The genus Chaptalia is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas, and Chaptalia nutans is one of the species within this genus. Chaptalia nutans is a type of flowering plant that is native to Mexico.
